rationale: The citing paper mentions Goldstein et al. (2014) only in a parenthetical note when introducing its own MTurk experiment, as an example of prior online advertising research using MTurk. It does not build hypotheses from that paper, reuse its constructs or measures, or interpret results through that paper's ad-annoyance findings. The citation serves as brief methodological background rather than a meaningful contribution to the paper's core argument.
